stemHtml: While flying inland from the coast, you encounter an incoming mass of colder air. Will this affect VHF radio communication?

options.a: No noticeable effect will occur, as VHF is immune to atmospheric changes.
options.b: VHF signals will reflect off the cold air layer and extend their range.
options.c: Signal attenuation will increase, reducing communication range.
options.d: Signal quality improves due to the denser air.
